# Backlog Item

- Backlog Item ID: `BI-260002`
- Title: `Publish schema-backed consultant project listing`
- Requirement: [`FR-002`](../requirements/REQ-FR-260002.md)
- Persona/Actor: `Small-business decision maker validating consultant credibility`
- Value statement: `For small-business prospects, deliver a consistent project listing to achieve confidence in practical problem-solving capability.`
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `Projects section renders cards from repository-local content records.`
  - `Each card includes title, business problem, delivered solution, and observed outcome in short format.`
  - `Cards support early-stage portfolio reality and do not require inflated case-study depth.`
  - `Invalid project records fail schema validation and block merge.`
- Dependencies: `CR-001 contract policy, content schema definitions.`
- Validation approach: `Schema validation checks, build verification, E2E navigation smoke tests.`
- Priority score: `90`
- Target window: `Phase 1`
- Links:
  - Requirement: [`requirements/REQ-FR-260002.md`](../requirements/REQ-FR-260002.md)
  - ADR: `adr/ADR-260001.md`
  - ICR: `n/a`
  - PR/changeset: `n/a`
